functions.name: mkstemp

params.name: suffix
params.description: Suffix for the temporary file name.

params.name: prefix
params.description: Prefix for the temporary file name. Defaults to 'tmp'.

params.name: dir
params.description: Directory in which to create the file. Defaults to the system temp directory.

returns.description: A tuple (fd, name) where fd is the OS-level file descriptor and name is the absolute path.

functions.description: Create a temporary file in the most secure manner possible. The caller is responsible for closing the file descriptor and deleting the file when done.

functions.name: mkdtemp

params.name: suffix
params.description: Suffix for the temporary directory name.

params.name: prefix
params.description: Prefix for the temporary directory name. Defaults to 'tmp'.

params.name: dir
params.description: Directory in which to create the directory. Defaults to the system temp directory.

returns.description: Absolute pathname of the new temporary directory.

functions.description: Create a temporary directory in the most secure manner possible. The caller is responsible for deleting the directory when done.

functions.name: gettempdir
functions.description: Return the name of the directory used for temporary files. This is the directory used by default by all functions in this module.

functions.name: NamedTemporaryFile
functions.signature: NamedTemporaryFile(mode='w+b', bufsize=-1, suffix='', prefix='tmp', dir=None, delete=True)

params.name: mode
params.description: File mode. Defaults to 'w+b' (binary read/write).

params.name: bufsize
params.description: Buffer size. -1 means the OS default.

params.name: suffix
params.description: Suffix for the file name.

params.name: prefix
params.description: Prefix for the file name. Defaults to 'tmp'.

params.name: dir
params.description: Directory in which to create the file. Defaults to the system temp directory.

params.name: delete
params.description: If True (default), the file is deleted when it is closed.

returns.description: A file-like object with a visible name in the file system.

functions.description: Create a temporary file that has a visible name in the file system. The file is deleted when closed unless delete=False. Can be used as a context manager.

functions.name: TemporaryFile

params.name: mode
params.description: File mode. Defaults to 'w+b' (binary read/write).

params.name: bufsize
params.description: Buffer size. -1 means the OS default.

params.name: suffix
params.description: Suffix for the file name.

params.name: prefix
params.description: Prefix for the file name. Defaults to 'tmp'.

params.name: dir
params.description: Directory in which to create the file. Defaults to the system temp directory.

returns.description: A file-like object with no name in the file system.

functions.description: Create a temporary file that has no visible name in the file system. The file is destroyed as soon as it is closed. Can be used as a context manager.

functions.name: SpooledTemporaryFile
functions.signature: SpooledTemporaryFile(max_size=0, mode='w+b', bufsize=-1, suffix='', prefix='tmp', dir=None)

params.name: max_size
params.description: Maximum size in bytes before the file is rolled over to disk. 0 means always roll over.

params.name: mode
params.description: File mode. Defaults to 'w+b' (binary read/write).

params.name: bufsize
params.description: Buffer size. -1 means the OS default.

params.name: suffix
params.description: Suffix for the file name.

params.name: prefix
params.description: Prefix for the file name. Defaults to 'tmp'.

params.name: dir
params.description: Directory in which to create the file when rolled over. Defaults to the system temp directory.

returns.description: A file-like object that is held in memory until it exceeds max_size.

functions.description: Create a temporary file that is held in memory (using StringIO) until it exceeds max_size bytes, at which point it is written to disk like TemporaryFile. Can be used as a context manager.

constants.name: tempdir
constants.description: When set to a value other than None, this variable defines the default directory for all tempfile functions. If None, the standard platform-specific temp directory is used.
